title: AllergyTJ
meta.desc: Seasonal allergy and pollen risk tracker for Tajikistan. Live pollen forecast, air quality, and 5-day outlook for 32 cities.
meta.keywords: pollen, allergy, Tajikistan, pollen forecast, air quality, Dushanbe, allergy tracker, pollen risk, AQI, seasonal allergy
og.title: AllergyTJ — Pollen & Allergy Tracker for Tajikistan
header.title: AllergyTJ
header.subtitle: Seasonal allergy tracker for Tajikistan — based on seasonal data & live weather
risk.0.label: None
risk.1.label: Low
risk.2.label: Moderate
risk.2.advice: Sensitive individuals may notice symptoms. Consider antihistamines.
risk.3.label: High
risk.3.advice: Allergy sufferers should limit outdoor exposure and take medication.
risk.4.label: Very High
risk.4.advice: Stay indoors if possible. Keep windows closed. Take allergy medication.
species.tree: Poplar, Cottonwood, Willow, Birch, Alder, Plane tree, Mulberry
wx.mod.strongSuppress: Weather is strongly suppressing pollen (rain/snow, cold, high humidity).
wx.mod.reducing: Weather conditions are reducing pollen levels.
wx.mod.amplifying: Weather is amplifying pollen (hot, dry, windy).
wx.mod.slightElevating: Weather conditions are slightly elevating pollen.
aqi.0.label: Good
aqi.1.label: Moderate
aqi.1.desc: Acceptable. Sensitive groups may be affected.
aqi.2.label: Unhealthy (SG)
aqi.2.desc: Sensitive groups should reduce outdoor activity.
aqi.3.label: Unhealthy
aqi.3.desc: Everyone may begin to experience health effects.
aqi.4.label: Very Unhealthy
status.backupTrying: Primary weather source unavailable, trying backup...
status.geoNotSupported: Geolocation not supported by your browser.
status.geoFailed: Could not get location. Please select a city manually.
status.error: Error displaying results. Check seasonal calendar below for estimates.
tier.2: ⚠ Using backup weather source (wttr.in). Forecast limited to 2 days.
tier.3: ⚠ Weather data unavailable. Showing seasonal pollen estimates only.
footer.note1: Pollen risk is estimated by combining a seasonal pollen calendar for Tajikistan's known allergenic flora with live weather data (Open-Meteo or wttr.in backup). No pollen monitoring stations exist in Tajikistan (I didn't find one) — risk levels reflect seasonal patterns adjusted for today's weather (rain, temperature, humidity, wind). If weather data is unavailable, seasonal estimates are shown without weather adjustment. Air quality (AQI, PM2.5, PM10) is modeled data from Open-Meteo CAMS. Not medical advice.
footer.note2: Built by Eraj Ismatulloev using Claude
